name: economic-research-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《经济研究》, the top economics journal in China.

plugins.name: economic-research-skills
plugins.description: Eighteen-skill bundle covering the 《经济研究》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, topic selection, introduction, literature review, theory & hypotheses, data & sample, modern identification (DID/IV/RDD/DML), mechanism (post-江艇 2022), heterogeneity, robustness, tables / figures, policy implications, abstract, house style, reviewer-lens self-audit, reproducibility, submission preflight, and R&R rebuttal — plus a runnable Stata + Python code library.
